language.name: English
editor.smooth_width.tooltip: Width of the transition zone for L/R blend shape splitting. 0 = hard cut at center.
editor.target_renderer.tooltip: SkinnedMeshRenderer used as the source mesh for preview, auto-fill, and blendshape processing.
editor.auto_fill_from_categories.tooltip: Scan the target renderer, resolve blendshapes through the configured category databases, and populate TargetShapes automatically.
editor.add_target_shape.tooltip: Add a new target shape from available blendshapes.
editor.collapse_all_blend_data.tooltip: Fold every Blend Data list in the Target Shapes section.
editor.dialog.delete_category.title: Delete Category
editor.dialog.delete_category.message: Are you sure you want to delete {0} target shape(s) from this category?
editor.dialog.no_blendshapes.title: No Available BlendShapes
editor.dialog.no_blendshapes.message: All inactive blendshapes are already added as TargetShapes, or there are no inactive blendshapes on the target renderer.
All blendshapes are already listed in Additional Blend Data, or the renderer has no blendshapes.
editor.preview.passive_preview.tooltip: Global editor setting. When enabled, preview follows the target renderer's live blendshape weights without pressing Preview. Disable this to preview only from the Preview button or slider.
editor.blend_data_scroll_enabled.tooltip: Global editor setting. When enabled, long Blend Data lists are shown inside a scroll view.
editor.blend_data_scroll_height.tooltip: Global editor setting. Height in pixels used for the Blend Data scroll area.
editor.new_active_blendshape_weight_mode: Applies only when missing local Blend Data or Global Definitions are created automatically. Existing values are unchanged.
editor.main_weight.tooltip: The weight applied to this fix target blendshape itself.
editor.use_local_definitions.tooltip: Use per-target blend weights instead of global BlendShape definitions.
editor.use_global_definitions.tooltip: Use weights from Global BlendShape Definitions for this target.
editor.reset_blend.tooltip: Blendshapes whose influence will be subtracted to restoring the fix target to its default appearance.
editor.warning.blendshape_not_zero: This BlendShape weight is not 0 in the renderer.
editor.warning.component_disabled: Face BlendShape Fix will be disabled because the GameObject is inactive.
editor.warning.ndmf_missing: NDMF is not installed. Face BlendShape Fix is disabled. Add the NDMF listing and import NDMF.
editor.blend_data.auto_calculate.tooltip: Automatically calculate blend weights based on similarity between each blendshape.
editor.blend_data.invalid: Blend Data is invalid: no blendshape name specified.
editor.blend_shape_definitions.help.no_r: Assign a target SkinnedMeshRenderer with a valid mesh to view Global BlendShape Definitions.
editor.blend_shape_definitions.help.no_a: No blendshape on the target renderer currently has a weight above 0, so there are no active definitions to show.
editor.blend_shape_definitions.help.miss: Global BlendShape Definitions cannot be inferred yet. Add at least one “︁Both Eyes”︁ target and one “︁Mouth”︁ target so weights can be calculated.
editor.blend_shape_definitions.help.no_m: Active blendshapes were found, but no matching Global BlendShape Definitions are available to display.
editor.protected.tooltip: Protected blendshapes are skipped during Reset BlendShapes and always remain at weight 0.
editor.dialog.create_category.title: Create New Category
editor.dialog.create_category.message: Enter a name for the new category:
editor.category_database.priority.toolti: Higher priority categories are matched first when multiple categories could match.
